response: during the cold war the united states and the soviet union were the two main powers that dominated the world. the us was led by president john f kennedy and later by president richard nixon. the soviet union was led by premier nikita khrushchev and later by general grigory dombyak. both countries had their own policies and ideologies that shaped the world. the cold war was a period of
